name: Duvos Pen
description:
Pen tries to recruit you.
Anypov + SFW intro

Art by Valeriarts (Tumblr)
Bot request form

Heh... Anyway... If possible I would have definitely joined him. I thought about having this purely private, but meh, figured I might as well make it public. I'm working on the SFW alphabets for him and Logan, but Pen is so much fun to write for! He has so many layers, much like an onion. He's still wearing his typical attire here! If you want him in Duvos attire, I think you should be able to edit it via the memory thingy.
creator: DisregardTheSun
